title: Extract Critical CSS
description: Given a full CSS file, extract the critical above-fold styles.
hint: Identify styles for header, hero, and navigation. Inline those in <head>. Load rest async.
solution: Move header, nav, hero styles to inline <style> in <head>. Load remaining CSS with <link rel="preload">.

title: Optimize Animations
description: Find and fix animations that trigger layout (width, height, top, left).
hint: Replace width/height animations with transform: scale(). Replace top/left with transform: translate().
starterCode:
.slide { animation: slideIn 0.3s; }
@keyframes slideIn { from { left: -100%; } to { left: 0; } }

title: Add content-visibility
description: Add content-visibility to below-fold sections of a long page.
hint: Add content-visibility: auto and contain-intrinsic-size to sections not visible on initial load.
starterCode:
<section class="hero">Above fold</section>
<section class="content1">Below fold</section>
<section class="content2">Below fold</section>

title: CSS Coverage Audit
description: Run a CSS coverage audit, identify unused styles, and remove them.
hint: Use DevTools Coverage tab. Export results. Identify unused rules and delete them.
solution: Open DevTools → Coverage → reload. Red-marked CSS is unused. Review and remove carefully, keeping defensive rules.

title: Full CSS Performance Audit
description: Conduct a complete CSS performance audit on a website: measure, identify issues, and optimize.
hint: Check: file size, render-blocking, critical CSS, animations, unused CSS, font loading, selector complexity.
solution: Create audit report: 1) Extract critical CSS 2) Minify 3) Add content-visibility 4) Fix animations 5) Remove unused 6) Add font-display: swap 7) Set up build pipeline with purge.
